title: ONDA Lab website
text:
Lab
  

  
  
This is the website of the ONDA Lab (Open methodologies in Neurorehabilitation and Data Analysis)
The Lab is located at IRCCS San Camillo in Venice and includes a core team of researchers and and a group of closely involved collaborators.
The lab research focuses on Neurorehabilitation and in particular on: Neurophysiology, Neuropsychology, and Neuroscience.


The Lab philosophy is focused on rigour and Open Science principles. We are committed to sharing our code, methods, data, results but also teaching materials and educational resources to the scientific community, to promote transparency, reproducibility and collaboration in research.
